description_long: This is a mid-rise apartment building with a slightly trapezoidal footprint and a red-tiled, hipped roof. The front facade features five stories, each with a row of balconies protected by black railings and large glass windows, separated vertically by a central blue-tinted glass stairwell or elevator shaft. The exterior walls are finished in a light, off-white color with subtle horizontal and diagonal line patterns, giving a modern yet understated appearance. The side and rear facades are plain, lacking windows or balconies, and are covered in the same light wall finish. The main entrance is located at the base of the front facade, marked by a set of double doors. The building's overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A five-story apartment building with a red-tiled hipped roof, light-colored walls, and a front facade featuring balconies and large windows. The sides and rear are plain, emphasizing a modern, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing five floors with balconies, large windows, a central blue glass shaft, and a double-door entrance.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, windowless wall with the red-tiled roof visible above.
description_view_2: Rear view with a featureless, light-colored wall and the hipped roof extending over the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also plain and windowless, mirroring the other side.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically aligned in vertical columns on the front facade, each paired with a balcony, while the sides and rear lack windows.
